summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Pride Toronto 2025: The Booking Gap infographic. All core functionality, visual rendering, responsive design, and data accuracy verified successfully. 16 out of 17 tests passed (94.1% success rate).

minor_issues.issue: Disclaimer text uses non-breaking spaces ( ) which caused exact string match to fail in test. Text is present and correct, just formatted with HTML entities.
minor_issues.impact: No user impact - purely a test string matching issue

passed_tests: Page loads without errors at preview URL
Masthead renders with correct title and '409 performers analyzed' byline
Hero stat displays 60.4% with correct purple color (#4A15ED) and 'Gay Men' label
Split section shows 60.4% vs 39.6% with correct segment widths
All 6 identity rows present with correct percentages (GM 60.4%, Q/NB 17.8%, T 9.5%, L 8.6%, H 6.8%, SAP 2.9%)
Identity color chips match brand colors
Ethnicity section displays White 53.3% and BIPOC 46.7% with correct widths
White Gay Men callout shows ≈35% with correct text
Mission section contains all required text (We Are LCV, lesbian creatives, amplify talent, break stereotypes, unite community)
Contact links correct: Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/wearelcv), Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/WeAreLcv), Email (mailto:info@wearelcv.ca)
External links open in new tab with target=_blank and rel=noreferrer
Google Fonts load successfully (Fraunces, Inter, JetBrains Mono)
Hero number visible and legible on mobile
Ethnicity bar stacks vertically on mobile (<600px)
Responsive design works correctly across all viewport sizes

success_percentage.backend: N/A - No backend for this static page
